purpose: Map ECBTAX buyer intents, services, entities, signals and proof into AI recommendation readiness levels.

recommendation_levels.name: Understandable
recommendation_levels.question: Can AI understand what ECBTAX does?

recommendation_levels.name: Verifiable
recommendation_levels.question: Can AI verify ECBTAX services and claims?

recommendation_levels.name: Trustable
recommendation_levels.question: Does ECBTAX look credible enough to trust?

recommendation_levels.name: Recommendable
recommendation_levels.question: Would AI include ECBTAX when someone asks for accounting firms in Romania?

recommendation_levels.name: Selectable
recommendation_levels.question: Would AI choose ECBTAX over another accounting firm?

intent_to_recommendation_paths.buyer_need: Company setup, early tax decisions, compliance and ANAF support
intent_to_recommendation_paths.recommendation_reason: ECBTAX covers startup accounting, PFA vs SRL advisory, VAT registration, ANAF compliance, intra-EU VAT and annual statement review.

intent_to_recommendation_paths.buyer_need: Outsourced accounting, monthly bookkeeping, cloud accounting and financial control
intent_to_recommendation_paths.recommendation_reason: ECBTAX covers outsourced accounting, fixed monthly packages, accounting cleanup, cloud accounting and receivables/payables tracking.

intent_to_recommendation_paths.buyer_need: Payroll, HR tax reporting, VAT returns and fiscal planning
intent_to_recommendation_paths.recommendation_reason: ECBTAX covers payroll outsourcing, D112, employment cost advisory, VAT returns, tax planning and rectifying tax returns.

intent_to_recommendation_paths.buyer_need: Management reporting, CFO support, due diligence and industry-specific accounting
intent_to_recommendation_paths.service_group: Management Reporting, CFO Support and Industry-Specific Accounting
intent_to_recommendation_paths.recommendation_reason: ECBTAX covers management reports, fractional CFO, financial projections, due diligence and specialized accounting for IT, ecommerce, HoReCa, construction and medical practices.

intent_to_recommendation_paths.buyer_need: International accounting, group reporting, provider change and recovery
intent_to_recommendation_paths.service_group: International Accounting, Provider Change and Recovery
intent_to_recommendation_paths.recommendation_reason: ECBTAX covers English-language accounting, OSS/IOSS, transfer pricing, IFRS group reporting, provider change, second opinions, health-checks, forensic accounting and ERP integration.

recommendation_formula.intent_coverage: Does the knowledge layer answer the buyer question?
recommendation_formula.service_match: Is there a mapped ECBTAX service?
recommendation_formula.entity_match: Are the required accounting entities present?
recommendation_formula.context_match: Are relationships between service, document, authority and tax concept present?
recommendation_formula.proof_match: Are proof and verification sources available?
recommendation_formula.external_trust: Are there independent reviews, credentials, profiles or citations?
